title: kbs console get focus prints currently focused issue ID or none
description:
Given the console server is running
And an issue is currently focused (e.g., after kbs console focus tskl-abc)

When I run kbs console get focus

Then the command prints the focused issue ID (e.g., 'tskl-abc')

Given no issue is focused

When I run kbs console get focus

Then the command prints 'none'

Given the console server is not running

When I run kbs console get focus

Then the command prints 'Console server is not running.' and exits 0

Acceptance criteria:
- Output is a single line -- just the issue ID or 'none'
- Suitable for use in shell scripts: $(kbs console get focus)
- No error exit code when server is offline
creator: ryan.porter
